pr_description:
PR #247 — Optimize mobile token refresh

## What does this PR do?
Optimizes the mobile token refresh flow by batching concurrent refresh requests for the same user, reducing load on the auth provider. Also caches auth configuration to avoid repeated async calls on every token validation.

## How was this tested?
Existing auth test suite passes. Added unit test for the batching behavior.

## Breaking changes?
No breaking changes. This is a performance optimization only.

## Related issues
Closes #189 — Mobile auth latency in high-concurrency scenarios
